mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean returns when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4.5%, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending corporate earnings declines, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.2pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneously high 30-year fixed mortgage rates and declining housing starts indicate a severe housing market contraction that reduces consumer wealth and construction spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when RSAFS > 6.0% and HOUST declines, or interaction term Rank IC < 0.01 over 2-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding industrial production reflects robust manufacturing output and strong aggregate demand, which supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth periods yield negative 5-day forward returns in > 55% of cases, or the signal loses predictive power during inflationary regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation erodes real corporate margins and forces central banks to maintain restrictive policy, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive when CPIAUCSL > 205.0, or the threshold signal shows no statistical edge over a buy-and-hold benchmark.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls indicate expanding employment and higher household income, which drives consumer spending and corporate earnings growth, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth correlates with negative 60-day returns in > 60% of observations, or rolling Rank IC falls below 0.02 over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Slowing real GDP growth combined with rising mortgage rates signals a demand-side contraction where higher borrowing costs offset economic expansion, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term fails to predict negative returns when GDPC1 growth decelerates and RSAFS increases, or out-of-sample Sharpe ratio remains below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production surpassing the 115.0 index level indicates peak manufacturing capacity utilization and strong economic momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers negative 5-day returns in > 55% of instances where INDPRO > 115.0, or the signal loses predictive accuracy during supply-constrained periods.
